texto: She's thinking that what she's been doing all these years isn't what she wants to do anymore. Sometimes music flows to her and from her, but sometimes it doesn't. Lately that happens more and more, and she can't seem to find what she had and what made her special. But she can't tell her father because he'd be so disappointed in her, so disappointed to find out she's not extraordinary after all.
explicacao: Citação de Leila Cobo sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “She's thinking that what she's been doing all these years isn't what she wants to do anymore. Som…” articula reflexao, creativity, music em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como music e writer-s-block.
